why_this_action: A live IndieStack resubmission attempt exposed that the marketer could still miss prior outreach state. The highest-leverage fix was to repair the shared outreach-log path used across the marketing runtime so future lane selection, audits, Reddit/StackOverflow logging, Apollo sequencing, and submission execution all read the real duplicate-prevention source of truth at agents/marketing/outreach-log.md.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg is still the primary success gate
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: the bottleneck is distribution and message-to-primary-repo conversion, so wasted duplicate actions are especially harmful
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.md: the loop must do real work, not activity theater
distribution_lane_latest.json: easy-submit lanes were already considered spent, so duplicate handling must be trustworthy
agents/marketing/outreach-log.md: IndieStack had already been submitted on 2026-05-23 and should have blocked repeat work

summary: moved outreach-log references from the nonexistent workspace root file to the real agents/marketing/outreach-log.md file across the shared marketing runtime
added a regression test that asserts core lane-selection and execution components point at the canonical outreach log
revalidated duplicate-related selector and Apollo launcher behavior with unit tests after the path repair

runtime.command: python3 -m py_compile agents/marketing/distribution_lane_selector.py agents/marketing/distribution_lane_executor.py agents/marketing/apollo_sequence_launcher.py agents/marketing/marketing_workflow_audit.py agents/marketing/reddit_post.py agents/marketing/reddit_autopost.py agents/marketing/reddit_praw_post.py agents/marketing/reddit_praw_reply.py agents/marketing/reddit_monitor.py agents/marketing/stackoverflow_answer_lane.py agents/marketing/apollo_monitor.py agents/marketing/marketing_momentum_watchdog.py agents/marketing/hn_submit.py

outcome.marketing_effect: future runs are materially less likely to waste the best available slot on duplicate submissions or duplicate outreach, preserving scarce execution windows for fresh Codeberg-first distribution

next_review.success_signal: the next distribution run reads agents/marketing/outreach-log.md by default and avoids re-attempting channels already logged on 2026-05-23 such as IndieStack
